CustomField.formula:
IF( ISBLANK(Review_Stage__c), "No Stage Selected", IF( OR( Review_Stage__c = "Rejected", AND( Review_Stage__c = "Offered", OR( Cand_Status_Review__c = "Backout", Cand_Status_Review__c = "Withdraw" ) ) ), IMAGE("/resource/Red_Flag", "Red", 30, 30) & " - " & Review_Stage__c & IF(Review_Stage__c = "Offered", " (" & Cand_Status_Review__c & ")", ""),
IF( OR( Review_Stage__c = "Shortlisted", AND( Review_Stage__c = "Offered", Cand_Status_Review__c = "Joined" ) ), IMAGE("/resource/Green_Flag", "Green", 30, 30) & " - " & Review_Stage__c & IF(Review_Stage__c = "Offered", " (" & Cand_Status_Review__c & ")", ""),
IMAGE("/resource/Yellow_Flag", "Yellow", 30, 30) & " - " & Review_Stage__c ) ) )
CustomField.label: Candidate Status
